config.content.title: Refund Policy
config.content.description: This policy outlines the conditions under which refunds may be provided for any paid services on the Satta King 786 platform.

config.content.title: Refund Policy Sections
config.faq.items:
Free Services|The Satta King 786 platform primarily provides free informational content. No refund applies to free services.
Premium Features|If premium features are offered, refund eligibility depends on the specific terms associated with each service.
Refund Requests|All refund requests must be submitted within 7 days of purchase through our contact page.
Processing Time|Approved refunds are typically processed within 5-10 business days.
Non-Refundable Items|Digital content that has been accessed or downloaded is generally non-refundable.
Contact Us|For refund inquiries, please reach out through our contact page with your transaction details.
